category_sources: Official SourceForge project categorizes snownews as RSS Feed Readers and describes it as a text mode reader for RSS and Atom feeds.
source_facts.description says text mode RSS newsreader.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge project title is snownews.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge project links a snownews Web Site and includes README.md in project files.
source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project is maintained by msharov and links project code/download surfaces.
SourceForge release notes mention the project moved to GitHub; package metadata corroborates github.com/msharov/snownews as project website.
tags_sources: Official SourceForge page lists RSS, Atom, Console/Terminal UI, and C as project details.
source_facts.description identifies a text-mode RSS newsreader.
